title: Natural Healing Control
description: Control the rate of natural regeneration and food exhaustion, disable rapid saturation regen, starvation in peaceful and more. Fully configurable.
body:
Fully configurable customization of natural regeneration and food exhaustion mechanics. Allows for hunger drain and lethal starvation damage on any difficulty, including peaceful.

By default it makes natural regeneration slower and prevents rapid health recovery from saturation though you can of course turn this back on.

While this mod is not necessary on the client and may be run purely server side, due to how food level is handled by Mojang on peaceful mode, you may encounter visual desync on your hunger bar if playing on peaceful. Installing the mod on the client resolves this.
